Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x23E0 "RUPERTANDTHETOYMAKERSPARTY-23E0" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Rupert and the Toymaker's Party.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Patched the LDA #$00 instruction at $2401 to be LDA #$01 instead. This causes $2618 to be initialised to #$01, which allows keys 1 - 4 to be used straight away on the title screen to choose a route rather than having to wait for a while.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
